experiences.title: Front-end Developer
experiences.subtitle: Personal Portfolio Project
workDescription: Designed and developed a high-performance personal portfolio using **React.js** and **Framer Motion** for modern UI/UX effects.
Optimized web performance and SEO, achieving a Lighthouse score of over **90/100**.
Integrated advanced interactive features including a **Cursor Trail** effect and **Glassmorphism** layouts to enhance user engagement.

experiences.title: Full-stack Web Developer
experiences.subtitle: E-commerce Platform (Academic Project)
workDescription: Architected a full-featured online store with integrated Shopping Cart, Secure Checkout, and Order Management systems.
Developed a robust Backend using **Node.js** and **Express**, managing a **MongoDB** database for over **500** product SKUs.
Implemented a fully responsive design ensuring a seamless user experience across all mobile and desktop devices.

experiences.title: Technical Contributor
experiences.subtitle: University IT Club
workDescription: Coordinated and provided technical support for programming competitions involving over **200** participants.
Developed a membership registration module for the club's official website using **React-Bootstrap** and Firebase.
Collaborated with a team of 5 developers to maintain and update internal web tools.
